frozen_components: GPT-2 language model (for retrieval, ranking, and objective estimation)
architecture.summary: POKI is a post-hoc knowledge injection framework for dialog systems that operates at decoding time without retraining. Given a dialog history and an initial response from a base dialog model, it retrieves diverse knowledge snippets from parametric (language models) and non-parametric (corpus) sources. A Determinantal Point Process selects relevant but diverse snippets using PMI-based relevance and redundancy scores. For each selected snippet, gradient-based constrained decoding iteratively modifies the base model's hidden representations via backward passes (maximizing knowledge fidelity and entailment objectives) and forward passes (maintaining fluency), producing candidate responses. An unsupervised ranker selects the final response via Z-normalized aggregation of distinct bigrams and GPT-2 likelihood.

biblio.title: Achieving Conversational Goals with Unsupervised Post-hoc Knowledge Injection

claims.statement: POKI achieves 71.1% accuracy on MultiWOZ test set
POKI achieves 3.78 distinct bigrams (D-2) on MultiWOZ
POKI achieves 3.65 distinct bigrams (D-2) on Wizard-of-Wikipedia
In human evaluation on MultiWOZ, POKI is judged as more engaging (94.3% win vs SimpleTOD) and more interesting (92.7% win vs SimpleTOD) compared to baselines
In real-time user study on goal-oriented dialog (MultiWOZ), POKI achieves 86% goal success rate compared to 69% for Rewriter baseline

claims.metric: average number of turns to goal
claims.statement: In real-time user study on goal-oriented dialog, POKI achieves goal completion in average 4 turns compared to 8 turns for Rewriter
In real-time user study on knowledge-grounded dialog (WoW), 89% of POKI's successful goal cases were directly influenced by post-hoc knowledge injection compared to 70% for BART baseline

The knowledge fidelity constraint is critical for diversity and accuracy; ablation without knowledge fidelity drops accuracy to 70.0% and D-2 to 0.95 on MultiWOZ, while the entailment constraint primarily influences coherence
